name: Azure WAF Custom Rule — Administrative Surface Restriction
objective: Restrict Azure WAF protected administrative routes to approved source ranges and trusted operating channels.
risk_mitigated: Public exposure of management and support paths that increases scanning, credential attack, and unauthorized access risk.
potential_side_effects: Remote administrators and outsourced support teams may require explicit source range allowlists or privileged access routing.
tuning_notes: Scope the rule to exact admin paths and maintain source ranges through IaC, not ad hoc dashboard edits. Keep staging and production allowlists separate.
deployment_notes: Deploy in Detection mode first through Front Door or Application Gateway custom rules, then move to Prevention after validating all operational admin flows.
monitoring_notes: Monitor blocked requests for /admin, /manage, /backoffice, and partner support paths. Review requests by source ASN and user-agent during rollout.
